SHORT NAME: NEW_RX_REFILL_NUM 

LONG NAME: NEW_RX_REFILL_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: 00 = New prescription 
01–99 = Number of refill(s) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown
